positive: A minimalist, high-contrast vector illustration of a whimsical cityscape at sunset. The scene features stylized mountain ranges transitioning into geometric buildings, connected by flowing river lines. The style is Pacific Northwest Art Deco meets Japanese Ukiyo-e, characterized by clean silhouettes, bold linework, and flat planes of color. Use a limited, complementary color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, sky blue, and forest green. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for an apparel print repeat. Focus on crisp lines, solid color blocks, and dramatic negative space. Highly detailed, graphic design, vector art, suitable for screen printing.
